cases.title: Verify initiating payment from list page succeeds when bill has a valid subsidiary
Verify payment list page does not throw error when payment entry has null subsidiary
Verify payment initiation works across multiple subsidiaries from the list page
Verify Tax Type label uses display_name (not name) after Tax Code is applied
Verify Tax Type field shows correct label for tax codes with differing name and display_name
Verify bill entry tax fields are unaffected by SuiteTax configurations
Verify payment tabs do not overlap with the export window when export panel is opened
Verify payment page UI layout is correct at standard and wide screen resolutions
Verify export window opens and closes without disrupting tab layout
Verify resubmitting a sent-back bill in a closed posting period shows clear error
Verify "Send Back" button is disabled for bills in locked posting periods
Verify reopening posting period allows successful resubmission
Verify resubmitting a sent-back bill with amortization enabled shows clear error
Verify "Send Back" is disabled for bills with amortization that prevents ledger edits
Verify bills without amortization can be resubmitted normally after send-back
Verify draft bill currency is not overridden by vendor preferred currency on reload
Verify saved draft currency persists after re-selecting same vendor on existing draft
Verify currency auto-fill still applies correctly when creating a new (non-draft) bill
Verify a bill with Airbase prepayment amortization entries (already generated) can be archived without error
Verify archival operation does not trigger ledger editability validation for prepayment-linked bills
Verify ledger validation changes are scoped to edit operations only (regression gate)
Verify "Send Back" action is disabled when bill posting period is locked
Verify Approve action remains enabled for bills in locked posting periods
Verify backend support edit path allows locked-period bills to be resubmitted
Verify Edit CTA is hidden in bill listing when posting period is locked
Verify Manage Bills permission cannot bypass edit restriction on locked-period bill
Verify Airbase Admins receive a clear message attempting to edit locked-period bill
Verify bill creator cannot resubmit when posting period is locked
Verify a payment run cannot be created with an inactive payer bank account
Verify payment approval flow surfaces clear error when payer bank account is inactive
Verify bill detail page loads correctly from payment approval view
Verify user with Upload Invoices permission only sees invoices they uploaded (not all subsidiary invoices)
Verify user with Manage Inbox sees all invoices in accessible subsidiaries
Verify user with Spend Access to multiple subsidiaries sees only invoices scoped to their permission level
Verify invoice detail page is accessible for invoices where user is uploader/watcher
Verify invoice detail page is not accessible without upload/watcher relationship and no Manage Inbox
